sentences.translationEn: Salim took a photo of his friends with his phone.

sentences.arabic: أَرْسَلَ الصُّورَةَ إِلَى الْمَجْمُوعَةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Poslao je fotografiju grupi na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: He sent the photo to the group on the internet.

sentences.translation: Napisao je kratku poruku uz nju.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote a short message with it.
His friends replied to him happily.
